code:
import api from'./api';const jobAPI={// Get available jobs (for interpreters to browse)
getAvailableJobs:function(){let params=arguments.length>0&&arguments[0]!==undefined?arguments[0]:{};return api.get('/jobs/available',{params});},// Get interpreter's jobs (their assignments)
getMyJobs:function(){let params=arguments.length>0&&arguments[0]!==undefined?arguments[0]:{};return api.get('/jobs/my-jobs',{params});},// Get interpreter's earnings
getEarnings:function(){let params=arguments.length>0&&arguments[0]!==undefined?arguments[0]:{};return api.get('/jobs/earnings',{params});},// Accept a job
acceptJob:function(jobId){let data=arguments.length>1&&arguments[1]!==undefined?arguments[1]:{};return api.post("/jobs/".concat(jobId,"/accept"),data);},// Decline a job
declineJob:function(jobId){let data=arguments.length>1&&arguments[1]!==undefined?arguments[1]:{};return api.post("/jobs/".concat(jobId,"/decline"),data);},// Unassign from a job (only if 24+ hours away)
unassignJob:function(jobId){let data=arguments.length>1&&arguments[1]!==undefined?arguments[1]:{};return api.post("/jobs/".concat(jobId,"/unassign"),data);},// Confirm availability for a job after schedule change
confirmAvailability:function(jobId){let data=arguments.length>1&&arguments[1]!==undefined?arguments[1]:{};return api.post("/jobs/".concat(jobId,"/confirm-availability"),data);},// Complete a job (now triggers completion report)
completeJob:jobId=>{// This will now open the completion report form instead of directly completing
return Promise.resolve({success:true,message:'Opening completion report form'});},// Admin: Get all jobs
getAllJobs:function(){let params=arguments.length>0&&arguments[0]!==undefined?arguments[0]:{};return api.get('/jobs',{params});},// Admin: Get job statistics
getJobStats:()=>{return api.get('/jobs/stats');},// Admin: Create a new job
createJob:data=>{return api.post('/jobs',data);},// Admin: Get a specific job
getJobById:id=>{return api.get("/jobs/".concat(id));},// Admin: Update a job
updateJob:(id,data)=>{return api.put("/jobs/".concat(id),data);},// Admin: Delete a job
deleteJob:id=>{return api.delete("/jobs/".concat(id));},// Admin: Assign a job to an interpreter
assignJobToInterpreter:(jobId,data)=>{return api.post("/jobs/".concat(jobId,"/assign"),data);},// Admin: Get job assignments
getJobAssignments:function(jobId){let params=arguments.length>1&&arguments[1]!==undefined?arguments[1]:{};return api.get("/jobs/".concat(jobId,"/assignments"),{params});}};export default jobAPI;
